content.text:
❌Sign in with Facebook?
❌Sign in with Google?

✅Sign in with my own website!

@aaronpk teaches how to manage your own identity with IndieAuth in the latest piece in the dweb series on @mozhacks.

https://hacks.mozilla.org/2018/10/dweb-identity-for-the-decentralized-web-with-indieauth/
